pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + MLP 3.5× + Mixed int5/int6 + Brotli — 1.1125 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton+CUTLASS MLP kernels, widens the MLP to 3.5× per SVD insight, and uses Hessian mixed int5/int6 quant plus Brotli/LR floor for the 16MB stack.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward with CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels
Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 GPTQ allocation to support wider MLP
Brotli-11 compression paired with LR floor warmdown
